songs.title: Mad Season
feed: “Mad Season” by Matchbox Twenty returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 2nd nonconsecutive week at the top.
“Mad Season” by Matchbox Twenty is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 114 sales units.
“Mad Season” by Matchbox Twenty is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 195 streams units.
“Mad Season” by Matchbox Twenty is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 508,879 total units.
